personal.name: Ian Sonoda McFarland
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.bio: Recent Graduate from McGill University. Currently building a freelance management application.

projects.title: Resumind
projects.description: Your AI-powered secret weapon for the job hunt. 🚀 Scans resumes against job descriptions to find skill gaps and boost your ATS score.
projects.content:
THE STRUGGLE IS REAL

Applying for jobs is a full-time job in itself, and it sucks. I wanted to build something that actually helps us bypass those annoying automated filters (ATS). No more screaming into the void!

THE FIX

Resumind takes your PDF, matches it with the job you want, and gives you a breakdown that matches the industry standards. It uses Puter.js and some crazy AI magic to scan your resume and tells you exactly what's missing.

KEY FEATURES

• Intelligent AI Analysis: Deep-scans your resume against specific job descriptions for professional-grade feedback.
• ATS Scoring Engine: Get a precise "Applicant Tracking System" score and learn exactly how to bypass automated filters.
• Strategic Keyword Extraction: Finds 8-15 critical keywords from any job description and checks if they're in your resume.
• Targeted Feedback: Improves your tone, content, and structure for maximum impact.

I built this because let's be real, reading job descriptions is soul-crushing. This app does the heavy lifting so you can focus on being the professional you (hypothetically) are. 💼

projects.title: Movie Search App
projects.description: Sleek, dark-themed movie discovery app. Tracks live search trends using Appwrite while you hunt for your next binge-watch. 🎬
projects.content:
WHY I BUILT IT

Movie night just got an upgrade! I wanted to play around with Appwrite and see how I could track live search trends without making the app feel slow. Plus, I needed a way to find movies while procrastinating in class. 🍿

THE TECH

• React + Vite: For that lightning-fast development experience.
• Appwrite: Handles the backend and tracks the most searched terms in real-time.
• TMDB API: The source of truth for all things cinema.

COOLEST PART

The debounced search! No more spamming the API every time you type a letter. It's smooth, optimized, and optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop screens. It honestly just looks really good with the dark-themed visuals. 📱

projects.title: Portfolio
projects.description: Wait, you're literally looking at it right now! 🤯 My personal showcase built with React and Tailwind to hold all my random projects.
projects.content:
META MOMENT

Welcome to the most meta project in my portfolio - the very website you're reading this on! This is my personal portfolio, built to showcase everything I've been working on while pretending to study at McGill. 🎓

THE VIBE

I wanted something clean, minimalistic, and snappy. Built with React and Tailwind to keep things lightweight, with custom animations to make it feel alive. 

FEATURES

• Custom Animations: Smooth transitions and scroll observers.
• Dark Mode Aesthetic: Sleek visuals for that premium feel.
• Responsive Layout: Looks great on your phone or your ultra-wide monitor.
• Dynamic Data: Everything is driven by a central JSON source of truth.

It's basically a place for all my random projects and a way to prove I actually know how to code. Check out the other projects while you're here! ✅
